title: [TaCZ] Original HK-416D
description: Restores the original HK-416D prior to TaCZ 1.1.7
body:
_This pack **does**:_
- Addes the original HK-416D prior to TaCZ 1.1.7
- Balances the HK-416D as the stats are very similar to the HK-416A5 in TaCZ 1.1.7+

_This pack **does not**:_
- Replace the current HK-416A5
- **Steal the credit to the TaCZ Dev Team**

It is recommended to change the HK-416A5's name in the 
```
(modpack_name)/tacz/tacz_default_gun/assets/tacz/lang/en_us.josn
```
 to HK-416A5, becuase the devs forgot to rename it.
If you do not, there should not be errors, they will just both have the same name.

**I do not take credit for any of the work of the TaCZ Dev Team**, I only ported the original HK-416D to newer versions of TaCZ.
